xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DisclosureOfNotesOnFinancialRe: FORMAT OF CASH FLOW STATEMENT THE BANK IS NOT MATCHING WITH THE FORMAT GIVEN I N THE EXCEL UTILITY.WE HAVE UPLOADED ON EXCHANGE'S WEBSITE THE COPY OF CASH FLOW IN PDF ALONG WITH FINANCIAL RESULTS
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RemarksForTotalFinancialIndebt: this represents total borrowing of the Bank in Rs. crore
